strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms like AWS
Proven track record in AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq
Strong open-source contributions and tooling expertise (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts, Trial)
concerns: Resume uses inconsistent name (Szabo Bogdan) vs. candidate name (Aisha Okonkwo), raising red flag for authenticity
Limited explicit mention of Nest.js, Vitest, or Kubernetes in context of professional projects despite required stack
German language proficiency is listed as 'Basic', which may hinder collaboration in Berlin-based enterprise environment
response.justification: The candidate demonstrates deep full-stack expertise, strong open-source contributions, and direct experience with AI-agent systems — all highly aligned with the role — but the significant discrepancy between the resume name and candidate name, combined with minimal evidence of required stack components and limited German proficiency, introduces serious credibility and collaboration concerns.
